name: Venison with Green Peppercorns
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chopped fresh chives, thyme -or- parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the green peppercorns in the bourbon for at least 30 minutes, or longer.
2. Heat the butter in a sauté pan over medium heat.
3. Season both sides of the venison fillets with salt and freshly ground pepper.
4. Sauté the venison quickly for about 2 minutes per side (depending on thickness) until it reaches your desired level of doneness, such as medium rare. Remove from the pan and keep warm.
5. Add the chopped shallots to the pan juices and cook for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the green peppercorns and bourbon, then boil for an additional 1 minute.
7. Gradually add the red wine and continue cooking until it reduces into a fine glaze.
8. Pour in the heavy cream and continue cooking until the sauce coats the back of a spoon.
9. Finish by stirring in the chopped herbs (chives, thyme -or- parsley) and any remaining meat juices.
10. Serve the sauce over the venison fillets.
